title: Types and Sources of Noise in Color Images
description: A visual breakdown of common noise types found in color images, their primary causes, and the color channels they affect.
relationships: Original image is captured by a sensor which introduces Shot Noise
Sensor's circuitry adds Thermal Noise during signal readout
Noise can be introduced during Transmission as Salt & Pepper noise
Processing the signal introduces Quantization Noise
All noise types corrupt the individual Red, Green, and Blue channels
The combined result is a Noisy Color Image with degraded visual quality
